description: Configure the Nx Witness VMS Event Rules for a retail loss prevention scenario. Create three rules: for a Generic Event with Source 'POS-Register-01' and Caption 'VOID', create a Bookmark on the 'Entrance Camera'; for a Generic Event with Source 'POS-Register-01' and Caption 'REFUND', show a Desktop Notification; and create a Soft Trigger on the 'Entrance Camera' named 'Silent Alarm' using the Bell or Alarm icon that creates a Bookmark on the 'Entrance Camera' when clicked. Login with admin/Admin1234! if prompted.
